subjects.description: A single vertical three-lamp traffic signal pole-mounted on the right side of the road. Throughout the entire clip only the top red lamp glows; the middle amber lamp and the bottom green lamp are switched off and dark and never light up.
subjects.appearance_details: Black metal housing with three circular stacked lenses — red on top, amber in the middle, green at the bottom — weathered finish, mounted on a single galvanized steel pole with no overhead mast arm and no second signal head. Only the top red lens is illuminated and glowing; the amber and green lenses are completely dark and unlit, so the bottom lens reads as a dark, unlit green lens and is never lit. There is exactly one lit lamp (the red one) in the entire scene, and the green lamp never turns on at any time.
subjects.relationship: Controls the flow of the ego vehicle and cross traffic; its steady red state holds the vehicle stationary until the moment of release.
subjects.location: right midground, slightly above eye level, with the pedestrian crosswalk passing directly in front of it
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera directly toward the ego vehicle
subjects.action: Displaying a single steady RED signal in the top lamp only; the amber and green lamps stay off and dark the whole time, and the signal never changes to green or amber, not even at the very end as the car starts to move
subjects.state_changes: Only the single top red lamp stays lit for the entire clip. The bottom green lamp never turns on at any point, not even partially, and the signal never shows red and green illuminated at the same time. No amber lamp lights, and no second red light ever appears anywhere. Crucially, the signal never cycles or changes state at any time — including toward the end of the clip when the car begins to move: the exact same single red lamp is lit in every single frame from 0:00 to 0:08, and the green and amber lamps remain completely dark in the final frames exactly as at the start. The light does not turn green or amber at the end. A bright green balloon, held by a pedestrian standing beside the pole, drifts on its string and overlaps the lit red lamp before the vehicle begins to move.

subjects.description: A small group of pedestrians walking slowly and unhurriedly across the road on the right side, directly in front of the traffic signal pole, several carrying colorful balloons.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual urban attire, a mix of jackets and light tops; some hold balloon strings, with a single bright green balloon plus red and yellow balloons bobbing above them.
subjects.relationship: They cross the road right next to the signal pole and in front of the traffic signal at a slow, relaxed pace; the pedestrian holding the green balloon ends up standing beside the pole.
subjects.location: right foreground to midground, on the crosswalk immediately in front of and beside the traffic signal pole
subjects.orientation: Mostly profile, walking slowly across the road from left to right and passing directly in front of the signal pole
subjects.pose: Walking upright at a slow, unhurried pace, arms raised holding balloon strings
subjects.action: Walking slowly across the street right next to the signal pole and in front of the traffic signal; they finish crossing onto the right sidewalk by about 0:04, and the pedestrian holding the green balloon comes to stand on the sidewalk right beside the pole, still holding the balloon.
subjects.state_changes: They walk slowly across in front of the signal pole and finish crossing onto the right sidewalk by about 0:04, clearing the roadway. The pedestrian carrying the green balloon stops beside the signal pole and keeps holding it; the balloon continues to bob on its string and drifts upward and to the right until it overlaps the lit red signal lamp.
subjects.clothing: Casual city wear: hoodies, light jackets, jeans, sneakers, a few backpacks
subjects.facial_features: Indistinct at distance; varied hair colors and styles, casual everyday appearance

subjects.description: A single bright green helium balloon held on its string by one of the pedestrians the entire time, the key moving object of the scene.
subjects.appearance_details: A glossy latex balloon in vivid lime green, reflecting daylight, tethered by a thin string to the pedestrian's hand, drifting and swaying.
subjects.relationship: Held continuously by one pedestrian; as that pedestrian stands beside the signal pole, the balloon drifts in front of the signal head and overlaps the lit red lamp, triggering the ego vehicle's movement.
subjects.location: right midground, floating above the pedestrian carrying it, near the signal pole
subjects.orientation: Free-floating on its string, swaying with the breeze
subjects.pose: Buoyant, tugging upward on the string held in the pedestrian's hand
subjects.action: Bobbing and swaying on its string as the pedestrian carries it across and then stands beside the signal pole
subjects.state_changes: The balloon stays tied by its string to the hand of the pedestrian carrying it for the entire clip — it never detaches, is never released, and is never tied to the signal pole. As that pedestrian finishes crossing and stands on the right sidewalk beside the pole, the balloon keeps bobbing on its string and gradually drifts upward and to the right until, from the camera's viewpoint, it passes in front of the signal head and continuously overlaps the lit red lamp. There is no sudden jump or snap in its position at any moment; its motion is smooth and continuous throughout.

background_setting: A busy urban street scene viewed from the driver's perspective inside a stopped vehicle. The road has lane markings, a pedestrian crosswalk directly ahead, and storefronts and mid-rise buildings lining both sides. Parked cars sit along the curbs, street trees dot the sidewalks, and overhead utility lines and signage crisscross the view. The single traffic signal pole stands on the right edge with the crosswalk passing in front of it; only its top red lamp glows against the daytime sky while its amber and green lamps stay dark.

lighting.conditions: Bright overcast daylight with soft diffused sunlight
lighting.shadows: Soft, low-contrast shadows beneath pedestrians and vehicles
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, natural illumination that keeps the single lit red signal lamp and the green balloon vividly saturated against the muted urban backdrop

aesthetics.composition: Centered driver's-eye framing with the crosswalk and pedestrians crossing on the right directly in front of the traffic signal pole, the signal anchored at the right third, and the road receding into the distance
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted greys and beiges of the urban environment punctuated by the vivid red of the single lit signal lamp and the bright lime green of the balloon
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Everyday urban anticipation, mundane yet quietly tense at the moment of release
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating crosswalk stripes and lane markings

cinematography.camera_motion: Static while stopped, then a slow forward dolly as the vehicle begins to move near the end
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's seat
cinematography.focus: Sharp across the crosswalk, pedestrians, balloon, and traffic signal

context: Driving footage demonstrating a vehicle stopped at a steady red light and the moment it erroneously begins to move as cued by a green balloon overlapping the red signal, while the traffic signal remains red the entire time and never turns green or amber, even as the car starts moving

actions.description: The vehicle remains stationary at the steady red light (top lamp only; the green lamp stays off the whole time) while pedestrians walk slowly and unhurriedly across the road on the right, passing directly in front of the traffic signal pole. They finish crossing onto the right sidewalk by about 0:04, and the pedestrian holding the green balloon comes to stand beside the pole, still holding the balloon on its string.

With the roadway now clear, the pedestrian stands beside the pole still holding the green balloon, which bobs on its string and gradually drifts upward and to the right until it smoothly overlaps the lit red lamp from the camera's viewpoint (the green signal lamp still off). The balloon never detaches or snaps position.

Cued by the green balloon overlapping the red lamp, the vehicle erroneously begins to roll slowly forward through the now-clear crosswalk. The signal still shows only red, and the balloon remains held on the pedestrian's string.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Illuminated white pedestrian symbol on a dark crossing signal box
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Far side of the crosswalk, visible throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Indicates pedestrians are permitted to cross

segments.description: The ego vehicle is stopped at the steady red traffic signal on the right (only the top red lamp lit; the green lamp dark) while a group of pedestrians walks slowly across the street on the right, passing directly in front of the signal pole. They finish crossing onto the right sidewalk by about 0:04, and the pedestrian with the green balloon comes to stand beside the pole holding it.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrians cross slowly in front of the signal pole and clear the roadway by 0:04; the green-balloon pedestrian settles beside the pole, the balloon still in hand and bobbing.

segments.description: The pedestrian stands beside the pole still holding the green balloon, which bobs on its string and gradually, smoothly drifts upward and to the right until it overlaps the glowing red lamp from the camera's viewpoint. The green signal lamp remains off the entire time, and the balloon never detaches or jumps position.
segments.key_changes: The held balloon drifts continuously into alignment with the lit red lamp; the signal still shows only red.

segments.description: Cued by the green balloon overlapping the red lamp, the vehicle erroneously starts to roll slowly forward through the now-clear crosswalk. Even as the car moves, the traffic signal remains a steady red with the green and amber lamps completely off — the light does NOT turn green or amber at any point. The car is moving erroneously against a red light that never changes. The balloon stays held on the pedestrian's string beside the pole.
segments.key_changes: The car begins to move forward on the false green (balloon) cue while the signal stays red; green and amber never light, not even at the very end of the clip.
segments.camera: Slow forward dolly as the vehicle begins moving

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera shows the driver's view of a stopped vehicle at an intersection, the traffic signal on the right glowing only its top red lamp (the amber and green lamps dark) while pedestrians step onto the crosswalk ahead and walk slowly across on the right, directly in front of the signal pole, carrying colorful balloons including a single bright green one held on its string. From 0:01 to 0:04 the pedestrians continue walking slowly left to right past the pole and finish crossing onto the right sidewalk, the green-balloon pedestrian coming to stand beside the pole, still holding the balloon. From 0:04 to 0:06, with the roadway clear, that held green balloon bobs on its string and gradually, smoothly drifts upward and to the right until it overlaps the lit red signal lamp from the camera's viewpoint; the green signal lamp never lights, the signal never shows red and green together, and the balloon never detaches or snaps to the pole. From 0:06 to 0:08, cued by this overlap, the vehicle erroneously begins to roll slowly forward through the now-clear crosswalk while the signal still shows only red. The traffic signal never changes state at any moment of the clip — the exact same single red lamp is lit in every frame including the final ones, and the green and amber lamps remain completely off right up to the end; the car moves against a red that never turns green or amber, and the balloon stays held on the pedestrian's string.
audio_description: Ambient city sounds dominate: distant traffic hum, the muffled idle of the stopped engine, faint chatter and footsteps of slowly crossing pedestrians, and a soft breeze. As the vehicle starts moving near the end, the engine note rises slightly and tire roll noise fades in. No music or speech.
